description_long: This hot-air balloon features a large, nearly spherical envelope with alternating vertical red and blue stripes, capped with a gray top. The envelope is reinforced by a dark horizontal band around its widest point, providing structural support. A small, rectangular wicker basket is suspended beneath the envelope, attached by visible cables or ropes. One side of the envelope displays a large white graphic of a hot-air balloon, adding a distinctive visual element. The surface of the envelope appears to be made of durable, slightly matte fabric, while the basket is constructed from woven material. The overall design is classic and vibrant, making it highly visible and recognizable in an urban park or open area.
description: A large, striped red and blue hot-air balloon with a gray top, dark reinforcing band, and a wicker basket suspended below. One side features a prominent white hot-air balloon graphic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red and blue striped envelope with the basket directly below and no visible graphics.
description_view_1: This view reveals a small white patch or mark on the left side of the envelope, with the basket visible below.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this view shows the striped envelope and basket, with no major graphics or marks visible.
description_view_3: This view prominently displays a large white hot-air balloon graphic on the envelope, with the basket below.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The envelope features alternating vertical red and blue stripes with a gray cap at the top. One side displays a large white hot-air balloon graphic, while the rest of the envelope is patterned only with stripes.
